item.title: Learning is easier when you enjoy the process (and have patience) - my experience with english
item.description:
How I learned (and continue) learning English in my life (All posts in this blog may not reflect true scientific value, since they are merely reflecting my opinions and views on certain matters at the time it was written.)
When I think of subjects that I can use to train my writing, but that at the same time that I already feel comfortable to bring ideas and value to other that may happen to read, perhaps the first thing that comes to mind is English.
